title: cordyline rubella
intro: Cordyline rubella, also known as red cabbage palm or red dracaena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. Native to Australia, this plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cordyline rubella include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
